calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Braun for (administrator) Jeffrey Jang.

The Court stated that there are issues that were set out in the examiner's notes. Mr. Braun stated that he received the notes, that he uploaded (e-filed)3 documents addressing the concerns, that he corrected the math errors, addressed the receipts, corrected the inventory & appraisal amount, clarified that the administrator used his own funds to have the accounting prepared, that the $3500.00 was payment for research and calculations for 20 years of back property taxes and changes in ownership of the property, that the supplement was signed by Mr. Jang, that there is a waiver of notice by Carolyn Loew who is 1 of the beneficiaries of the trust and a declaration of Judith Lake (trustee) with a 13100 affidavit attached. Mr. Braun explained that he e-filed the documents yesterday, that he is not yet able to print file endorsed copies and provided the court with copies of the documents as well as a revised proposed order. The Court took the accounting petition under submission pending review of the documents.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lee. (Not Reported)
